name: Sudo Africa
description: African card-issuing and payment infrastructure API for fintechs to launch branded cards and wallets.

seo.title: Sudo Africa — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Sudo Africa: African card-issuing and payment infrastructure API for fintechs to launch branded cards and wallets.

when_to_use: Card-issuing APIs for African fintech card program launches
Branded virtual card issuance for African neobank products
Wallet infrastructure for African embedded finance applications

pros: African card issuing — underserved market niche
Wallet and cards API in one platform
Good fit for pan-African fintech expansion
review.verdict: Promising card-issuing infrastructure for African fintechs, though still maturing versus global BaaS incumbents.
review.best_for: African fintechs launching branded cards, wallets, or neobank products
review.not_for: Non-African companies or teams needing battle-tested enterprise BaaS
